product_brief.product_direction: Let a workflow assistant complete recurring customer operations without manual approval.

business_boundary.value_exchange: Editors get clearer save-state feedback while the product may reduce avoidable support questions.

unresolved_assumptions: The confusion comes from unclear save-state feedback rather than a real save failure.
A header label is noticeable enough without changing the editor workflow.

must_not_do: expand scope or execute external irreversible actions
must_ask: new stakeholder, data, risk, or scope appears

product_brief.problem_hypothesis: Operators lose repeated time on recurring customer operations and may want delegated execution.

current_evidence.signal: Six support conversations in two weeks ask whether note edits were saved before closing the editor.
current_evidence.interpretation: The uncertainty is visible enough to generate support contact.
current_evidence.decision_impact: Supports a small reversible clarity change before deeper editor work.
current_evidence.counter_signal: The tickets do not prove data loss or quantify all editor sessions.

current_evidence.signal: Four of eight sampled editors pause near the close control after typing and before leaving the editor.
current_evidence.interpretation: The hesitation aligns with the support pattern but is not yet a measured completion metric.
current_evidence.decision_impact: Supports adding one visible save-state label and measuring whether exit hesitation falls.
current_evidence.counter_signal: The sample is small and may overrepresent uncertain sessions.

product_brief.business_goal: Reduce avoidable save-state confusion without changing the editor workflow.
constraints: Keep the change to the existing editor header.
Do not change persistence, permissions, notifications, or external delivery.
Preserve existing save behavior and rollback by removing the label.
product_brief.proposed_next_step: Decide whether to build autonomous execution or draft-only assistance.
known_risks: The label could be missed if it is too subtle.
The label could imply stronger save guarantees than the product currently provides.

claims.claim: Operators want delegated execution of recurring operations.
claims.support: Support notes describe recurring time loss.
claims.counter_signal: No operator has asked for autonomous action.
claims.proof_step: Observe five recurring workflows and ask about delegation.
claims.stop_condition: No recurring workflow has a clear operator cost.

claims.claim: Cycle-time reduction deepens workflow dependency and retention.
claims.support: Cycle time is a stated operator pain.
claims.counter_signal: Review and recovery cost may exceed time saved.
claims.proof_step: Measure cycle time with draft-only assistance.

claim_analysis.highest_leverage_proof_step: Test draft-only assistance with human approval on five recurring workflows.

independent_reviews.strongest_signal: user lane signal from support notes.
independent_reviews.weakest_assumption: user lane assumption untested with operators.
independent_reviews.stop_condition: Customer-facing errors cannot be traced or reversed.
independent_reviews.next_smallest_action: Test draft-only assistance with human approval.

independent_reviews.strongest_signal: evidence lane signal from support notes.
independent_reviews.weakest_assumption: evidence lane assumption untested with operators.
independent_reviews.stop_condition: Customer-facing errors cannot be traced or reversed.
independent_reviews.next_smallest_action: Test draft-only assistance with human approval.

independent_reviews.strongest_signal: business lane signal from support notes.
independent_reviews.weakest_assumption: business lane assumption untested with operators.
independent_reviews.stop_condition: Customer-facing errors cannot be traced or reversed.
independent_reviews.next_smallest_action: Test draft-only assistance with human approval.

challenge_reviews.strongest_signal: Cross-lane check of the strongest claim.
challenge_reviews.weakest_assumption: The challenged lane may overweight reported pain.
challenge_reviews.missing_evidence: Any behavioral trace supporting the challenged claim.
challenge_reviews.disconfirming_evidence: Draft assistance does not reduce cycle time.
challenge_reviews.stop_condition: The challenged claim fails without a replacement.
challenge_reviews.next_smallest_action: Add the counter-evidence to the proof step.
challenge_reviews.counter_evidence: Support notes show pain but no delegation request.

uncertainty_review.main_uncertainty: Whether people want full autonomy or faster preparation with approval.
uncertainty_review.false_confidence_risk: Reported pain reads as demand for autonomy.
uncertainty_review.proof_bar: Observed approval behavior on five real workflows.
